match.userMessage:
Handheld camera at eye level holds a medium shot on Scarlett seated on the weathered bench with knees pulled up. She twists the lipstick tube open and applies it to her lips while gazing steadily out at the ocean horizon. Her hair lifts and drifts across her face from the coastal breeze. Subtle handheld micro-movement keeps the frame alive as gentle waves roll in the distance.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves and light coastal wind. lipstick tube twisting open.
